courses.title: Culturally-Aware Empathetic Conversational AI
courses.description: Multi-lingual support (Hindi, English, Hinglish, regional languages) with code-switching capability and context-aware responses that understand indian family dynamics, academic pressure, and cultural nuances. Emotion detection through sentiment analysis to adapt conversation tone in real-time

courses.title: Writing Journals
courses.description: Share your thoughts through writing journals. As much you write and express your feeling through writing, It'll eventually work in the sense of improving your mental health issues.

courses.title: Voice & Text Multi-Modal Interface
courses.description: Voice-based interaction for users with literacy barriers or privacy needs & text summarization of long conversations for quick review. Offline-capable chatbot with syncing when connected.

courses.title: Personalized Coping Strategy Recommendations
courses.description: AI-generated, evidence-based coping mechanisms tailored to individual situations and integration of indian practices (breathing exercises, mindfulness inspired by yoga/meditation). Progressive difficulty levels that adapt based on user progress and feedback.

courses.title: Peer Stories Matching & Anonymous Community
courses.description: AI-powered matching of anonymized success stories relevant to user's situation and safe, moderated peer support groups with AI-assisted content moderation.
